message:
fix(e2e): eliminate duplicate event handlers in test harness

- Remove dead `timing` property from NetworkEntry interface (never populated)
- Refactor createTestHarness to accept optional legacyArrays parameter
- Single handler now populates both structured state and legacy string arrays
- Remove unused type imports (TestHarnessState, TestInfo)
- Include uncommitted fullscreen 3D regression test in repro.e2e.ts

Previously setupTestHarness registered duplicate handlers for pageerror
and console events, causing each error to be captured twice. Now we use
a single handler that populates both the structured ConsoleEntry/PageErrorEntry
collections and the backwards-compatible string arrays.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
